section-title-01.heading: Everything you need to ship faster
section-title-01.description: Thoughtfully designed, carefully coded, and ready for production the moment you paste them in.

feature-card-01.title: Ship in minutes
feature-card-01.description: Drop a component into your project, adjust the copy, and ship. No configuration, no lock-in, no surprises.

feature-card-01.title: Fast by default
feature-card-01.description: Zero runtime dependencies for most components. Just markup and utility classes — your bundle stays lean.

feature-card-01.title: Accessible out of the box
feature-card-01.description: Keyboard navigation, focus management, and ARIA roles are hand-rolled and tested in every interactive piece.

feature-card-01.title: Built to convert
feature-card-01.description: Layouts modeled on the highest-converting SaaS pages, refined for clear hierarchy and honest spacing.

feature-card-01.title: Responsive everywhere
feature-card-01.description: Every component is reviewed at 375, 768, and 1280 pixels before it ships. Mobile is never an afterthought.

feature-card-01.title: Two frameworks, one design
feature-card-01.description: React and Vue twins with visual parity, so mixed stacks finally share a single design language.
